item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description: Booka is here! Say goodbye to long library queues. Browse recommended books for your department, add them to your cart, and get them delivered or picked up at your convenience.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description: Booka is here! Say goodbye to long library queues. Browse recommended books for your department, add them to your cart, and get them delivered or picked up at your convenience.
